title: kW1st
description: Hardcore mod where speedrunner kW1st got out of his world into multiverses and multiplied. Now kW1st is trying to kill you.
body:
### Introduction | Background:
Russian speedrunner kW1st when speedrunning minecraft accidentally went to multi universes, because of repeating things with other kW1st(s) and breaking the 4th wall there were a lot of them. Now in order to survive in this world you need to either quickly complete minecraft or craft a magic royal apple that can tame kW1st(a):
![Craft royal apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0df8a1d00e3c63279f8628f87edf5c930af24f45.png)
### Component of the mod(with description):
The mod contains some items that are related to kW1st. Such as the crown, the royal sword, the royal apple. More items will be in the next updates. This mod is suitable for people who like to play hardcore mods and try to pass Minecraft. If you wanted to play with kW1st, you can download the mod and try to win a kW1st in a fair 1 on 1 battle.(If anything, in the mod kW1st has a normal AI, and is not trained to use items or play in any way, etc.)
![Attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c400ef4da86756f7bb9aba0f3aec94bca3688c21.png)
## How to install a mod in your Minecraft:
To install the mod in your minecraft, open the .minecraft folder and load the mod into the mods folder (before that, install version 1.20.1 and the forge loader)
![kW1st](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b5344d1d96b2301faec51913c43c532c575c990.png)

## Additional links:
Twitch:https://www.twitch.tv/kw1sst

Telegram channel: t.me/KW1SToff

And also my telegram channel🇷🇺 there I publish information about mods and streams -->  https://t.me/KiberMods 🙃

(The mod does not intend to offend anyone.)
